sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: TRIKAFTA/KAFTRIO의 견고한 수요와 신제품 출시 효과로 2025년 2분기 매출 29억 6,470만 달러를 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 연구개발(R&D) 및 판매관리비(SG&A)를 포함한 총비용은 전년 동기 58억 달러에서 14억 달러로 감소했습니다.
판매관리비는 JOURNAVX 출시를 위한 상업적 투자 확대로 전년 동기 대비 14% 증가한 424.6달러를 기록했습니다.

riskChanges.text: 글로벌 공급망 및 제조 인프라 구축과 관련하여 생물학적 제제, 세포 및 유전자 치료제 생산 역량 유지의 중요성이 강조됩니다.

businessChanges.text: VX-264 임상 프로그램의 개발 중단에 따라 무형자산 손상 차손을 인식하는 등 파이프라인 효율화 작업을 진행 중입니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2025년 2분기 매출 29억 6,470만 달러, 영업이익 11억 5,110만 달러, 순이익 10억 3,290만 달러를 달성했습니다.
총자산 240억 3,670만 달러를 보유하고 있으며, 현금 및 현금성 자산은 49억 7,220만 달러 수준입니다.

watchItems.text: Alpine 인수 이후 비용 구조가 정상화되며 영업 현금흐름이 18억 9,200만 달러로 개선된 점은 향후 신약 개발 투자 여력을 뒷받침할 것입니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Quarter ended 2025-06-30 revenue = 29억 6,470만 달러 (USD 2.965B; 2,965 million), XBRL range 2025-04-01..2025-06-30. Readable Korean unit: 29억 6,500만 달러.
Quarter ended 2025-06-30 operating income = 11억 5,110만 달러 (USD 1.151B; 1,151 million), XBRL range 2025-04-01..2025-06-30. Readable Korean unit: 11억 5,100만 달러.
Quarter ended 2025-06-30 net income = 10억 3,290만 달러 (USD 1.033B; 1,033 million), XBRL range 2025-04-01..2025-06-30. Readable Korean unit: 10억 3,300만 달러.
Quarter ended 2025-06-30 total assets = 240억 3,670만 달러 (USD 24.037B; 24,037 million), XBRL range instant..2025-06-30. Readable Korean unit: 240억 3,700만 달러.
Quarter ended 2025-06-30 cash and cash equivalents = 49억 7,220만 달러 (USD 4.972B; 4,972 million), XBRL range instant..2025-06-30. Readable Korean unit: 49억 7,200만 달러.

ons, our ability to integrate and continue operations of acquired businesses, and our ability to successfully capitalize on these opportunities; • the establishment, development and maintenance of collaborative relationships, including potential milestone payments or other obligations, and other potential business development activities, including the identification of potential collaborative partners or acquisition targets; • our plans to build and maintain our global supply chains and manufacturing infrastructure and capabilities, including for biologics, cell and gene therapies; • our ability to expand and protect our intellectual property portfolio and otherwise maintain exclusive rights to products; • potential fluctuations in foreign currency exchange rates and the effectiveness of our foreign currency management program; • our expectations regarding cash generated by operations, o

Revenues In the second quarter of 2025, our net product revenues increased to $2.9 billion as compared to $2.6 billion in the second quarter of 2024, primarily due to continued strong patient demand for TRIKAFTA/KAFTRIO and early contributions from three ongoing launches. Expenses Our total research and development (“R&D”), acquired in-process research and development (“AIPR&D”), and selling, general and administrative (“SG&A”) expenses decreased to $1.4 billion in the second quarter of 2025 as compared to $5.8 billion in the second quarter of 2024, primarily due to $4.4 billion of AIPR&D expenses incurred from our acquisition of Alpine Immune Sciences, Inc. (“Alpine”) in May 2024. General and Administrative Expenses Three Months Ended June 30, Six Months Ended June 30, 2025 2024 Change 2025 2024 Change (in millions, except percentages) Selling, general and administrative expenses $ 424.6 $ 372.2 14% $ 821.0 $ 714.9 15% Selling, general and administrative expenses increased by 14% and 15% in the second quarter and first half of 2025, respectively, as compared to the second quarter and first half of 2024 primarily due to increased commercial investment to support the launch of JOURNAVX. Intangible Asset Impairment Charge In the first quarter of 2025, based on results from a Phase 1/2 clinical trial evaluating our VX-264 clinical program in patients with T1D, we concluded that VX-264 will not be advancing further in clinical development. Based on this event, we performed an interim impairment test on the fair value of our VX-264 indefinite-lived in-process research   Normalized numeric aliases: $424.6 = 424.6달러; $372.2 = 372.2달러; $821.0 = 821.0달러; $714.9 = 714.9달러.
